---
title: "Wind, Forest, Fire, Mountain × PARA"
listing: false
---

👋 Welcome to my Knowledge Command Center. Driven by the philosophy of Sun Tzu's *Art of War*.

---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🌪️ [Swift as the Wind · Projects](projects.qmd)
**Speed & Timeliness**: Active projects and time-bound sprints. Moving fast with clear closures.
<br>
[⚔️ Enter Battlefield](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm role="button"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🌲 [Quiet as the Forest · Areas](areas.qmd)
**Rhythm & Discipline**: Ongoing responsibilities and domains. Growing steadily in order.
<br>
[🛡️ Patrol Camp](areas.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm role="button"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### 🔥 [Fierce as Fire · Resources](resources.qmd)
**Energy & Conversion**: High-octane knowledge bases and ammo. Expanding boundaries.
<br>
[🧨 Restock Ammo](resources.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm role="button"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### ⛰️ [Immovable as a Mountain · Archives](archives.qmd)
**Stability & Foundation**: Historical archives and experience. Solidifying the base for future actions.
<br>
[📜 Consult Records](archives.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm role="button"}
:::

:::
